_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of interactions and integration of DataOps, MLOps, and DevSecOps in AI.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of DataOps principles and practices, including pipeline automation, environment management, data testing strategies, configuration-as-code, and the distinction between DataOps, DevOps, and MLOps as complementary disciplines.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-026 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-017 (AI, cosine: 0.661), TF-K-009 (TF, cosine: 0.618).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.672). Shared vocabulary: [dataops, knowledge, mlops]. DCWF-only terms [ai, devsecops, integration, interactions] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, code, complementary, configuration, data, devops] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.914, R=0.885). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of interactions and integration of DataOps, MLOps, and DevSecOps in AI" and "Knowledge of DataOps principles and practices, including pipeline automation, en" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.665 ≈ STS 0.672 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [dataops, knowledge, mlops] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.2%. Shared tokens: [dataops, knowledge, mlops]. DCWF-only: [ai, devsecops, integration, interactions]. WIDAI-only: [automation, code, complementary, configuration, data, devops].
